full_text:
Dong Yue 董越
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dong Yue (董越). Sent to guard Mianchi against the Coalition. Killed by Niu Fu on advice of soothsayer. Dong Yue was affiliated with Dong Zhuo. Dong Yue lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
